title: Kaiju Glam Metal Shark Attack
overview: An accident from space has resulted in the creation of a Kaiju shark man! The wanton destruction has a pair of glam rock loving music fans worried that the concert they have been waiting their whole year for will be cancelled. Will the world be destroyed? Will the glam metal concert go on?
